blended.narrative: Telluride is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,905 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 34".
